description_long: This is a bust sculpture of a man wearing a military-style cap, rendered in a light-colored stone or plaster material. The figure's facial features are sharply defined, with a stern expression and prominent cheekbones. The cap has a flat top and a short brim, and the bust is mounted on a rectangular plinth. The front of the plinth bears an inscription, which appears to include the name 'Gen. De MUNAC SIMEANIN' and the years '1880-1949'. The surface of the sculpture shows some subtle textural variation, suggesting weathering or age. The overall form is geometric and stylized, with a strong vertical presence.
description: A light-colored bust of a man in a military cap, mounted on a rectangular plinth with an inscribed front. The sculpture features sharp facial details and a geometric, stylized form.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the face, cap, and the inscribed plaque on the plinth.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the ear, cap brim, and the side of the plinth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, cap, and the unadorned back of the plinth.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the opposite ear, cap brim, and the side of the plinth.
attribute_subject_matter: bust of a man in a military cap, likely a historical figure
attribute_location_context: No clear environmental context is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a white background.
